title: MATERNAL, INFANT, AND EARLY CHILDHOOD HOME VISITING - 211info
text: ANDERSON CENTER MATERNAL, INFANT, AND EARLY CHILDHOOD HOME VISITING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides home visits and education to help families connect to resources they need to ensure their child’s healthy development. 2727 SE Anderson Road Gresham, OR 97080 Eligibility: Income must be 100% of the Federal Poverty Level (FPL), and households with a pregnant individual or with children 0-3 years Hours: 48-week program, hours vary Email (503) 663-0896 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 663-0896 Main phone Main phone (503) 663-0896 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Multnomah County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located in East Gresham Services: Home Based Parenting Education Infant and Child Safety Education Prenatal/Postnatal Home Visitation Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - MIGRANT SEASONAL HEAD START If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ANDERSON CENTER
